visual_description: The scene opens with a close-up of two men sitting side-by-side. The man on the left, in a white police uniform with epaulets, looks forward with a serious expression. The man on the right, in a light blue shirt and dark tie, looks down and to his left with a pensive expression. The scene then cuts to a man in a white shirt and black tie standing with his arms crossed, looking at a television screen displaying grainy black-and-white security footage of a person in a dark suit. The man then uncrosses his arms and gestures with his right hand while speaking.
audio_description: A man speaks in a questioning and confrontational tone. Another man responds in a calm, matter-of-fact tone. The audio is clear and intelligible.
